fields.name: edge
fields.notes: edge fallback, used mainly for ores

fields.name: speedMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplies unit velocity by this when walked on.

fields.name: dragMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplies unit drag by this when walked on.

fields.name: damageTaken
fields.notes: Damage taken per tick on this tile.

fields.name: drownTime
fields.notes: How many ticks it takes to drown on this. 0 to disable.

fields.name: walkEffect
fields.notes: Effect when walking on this floor.

fields.name: walkSound
fields.notes: Sound made when walking.

fields.name: walkSoundVolume
fields.notes: Volume of sound made when walking.

fields.name: walkSoundPitchMin
fields.notes: Volume of sound made when walking.

fields.name: walkSoundPitchMax
fields.notes: Volume of sound made when walking.

fields.name: drownUpdateEffect
fields.notes: Effect displayed when drowning on this floor.

fields.name: status
fields.notes: Status effect applied when walking on.

fields.name: statusDuration
fields.notes: Intensity of applied status effect.

fields.name: liquidDrop
fields.notes: liquids that drop from this block, used for pumps.

fields.name: liquidMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier for pumped liquids, used for deep water.

fields.name: isLiquid
fields.notes: whether this block is liquid.

fields.name: overlayAlpha
fields.notes: for liquid floors, this is the opacity of the overlay drawn on top.

fields.name: supportsOverlay
fields.notes: whether this floor supports an overlay floor

fields.name: shallow
fields.notes: shallow water flag used for generation

fields.name: blendGroup
fields.notes: Group of blocks that this block does not draw edges on.

fields.name: oreDefault
fields.notes: Whether this ore generates in maps by default.

fields.name: oreScale
fields.notes: Ore generation params.

fields.name: oreThreshold
fields.notes: Ore generation params.

fields.name: wall
fields.notes: Wall variant of this block. May be Blocks.air if not found.

fields.name: decoration
fields.notes: Decoration block. Usually a rock. May be air.

fields.name: canShadow
fields.notes: Whether units can draw shadows over this.

fields.name: forceDrawLight
fields.notes: If true, this floor ignores the obstructsLight flag of overlays.

fields.name: needsSurface
fields.notes: Whether this overlay needs a surface to be on. False for floating blocks, like spawns.

fields.name: allowCorePlacement
fields.notes: If true, cores can be placed on this floor.

fields.name: wallOre
fields.notes: If true, this ore is allowed on walls.

fields.name: blendId
fields.notes: Actual ID used for blend groups. Internal.

fields.name: tilingVariants
fields.notes: If >0, this floor is drawn as parts of a large texture.

fields.name: autotile
fields.notes: If true, this floor uses autotiling; variants are not supported. See https://github.com/GglLfr/tile-gen

fields.name: autotileMidVariants
fields.notes: If >1, the middle region of the autotile has random variants.

fields.name: autotileVariants
fields.notes: Variants of the main autotile sprite.

fields.name: drawEdgeIn
fields.notes: If true (default), this floor will draw edges of other floors on itself.

fields.name: drawEdgeOut
fields.notes: If true (default), this floor will draw its edges onto other floors.
